name: demohiiiii--rauto-usage
description: Execute rauto directly for the user: run device commands, template execution, tx block, tx workflow, multi-device orchestration, replay, backup/restore, and connection/profile/template/history operations. Trigger on requests like run command for me, execute on device, check history, run workflow, orchestrate multiple devices, apply staged rollout, use inventory/groups, diagnose profile, manage templates/profiles/connections, replay records, or restore backup.
